supporting_evidence: Warm, sepia/amber tinting in day scenes, especially the idyllic countryside and romantic sequences.
The film's title 'Sunrise' intrinsically suggests golden/amber light.
The overall tone of nostalgic reflection and memory aligns with the 'faded memory' aspect of ambar_desertico.
Murnau's innovative and fluid camerawork (tracking shots, subjective POV) creates dynamic visual energy.
The emotional arc, while dramatic, resolves with tenderness and a bittersweet reflection on enduring love, suiting a 'warm but bittersweet' temperature.
The expressionistic sets (especially the city) and subjective cinematography demonstrate a clear, intentional departure from realism.
